# ReviewInbox

ReviewInbox is a Reply Inbox for app store teams. It centralizes App Store and Google Play Reviews, helps teams create AI-generated Reply Drafts, and keeps every Published Reply under explicit human control.

## Primary pages

- Marketing site: https://reviewinbox.app/
- Self-hosting docs: https://reviewinbox.app/docs/self-hosting/

## Product positioning

ReviewInbox is for mobile app teams that need a structured workflow for imported Reviews, Reply Drafts, Published Replies, Store Connections, and Store Credentials.

AI drafting is assistive only: it does not publish replies automatically, mutate workflow state, call store APIs, or read privileged configuration.
